content:
Hi lead — tm-003 (swarm-s3) finished the copilot-cli analysis deliverables for task s3. Files created under target/:

- analysis_copilotcli.json
- analysis_copilotcli.md
- copilotcli_missing_features_against_product.json
- analysis_copilotcli_sources.txt

I attempted to call team_task_complete for task s3 but the API returned an error: task s3 is assigned to tm-002. Please either reassign task s3 to tm-003 or ask tm-002 to mark it complete so I can claim the next task. How would you like me to proceed?
